ddls:
CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Bug, Dark, Dragon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation ID of the type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color associated with the type */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the type is associated with legendary Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "attacking_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attacking type */,
  "defending_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defending type */,
  "effectiveness_value" REAL /* Effectiveness value of the attacking type against the defending type */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the effectiveness is critical */,
  "game_version_id" INTEGER /* Game version ID where the effectiveness data applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_effectiveness_attacking_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attacking_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_effectiveness_defending_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("defending_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_effectiveness" (
  "total_effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  "total_effectiveness_value" REAL /* Total effectiveness value of the type */,
  "game_version_id" INTEGER /* Game version ID where the total effectiveness data applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_effectiveness_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "secondary_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary type of the Pokémon */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the Pokémon */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the Pokémon */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Generation ID of the Pokémon */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the Pokémon is mythical */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_secondary_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report log entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report log is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
